selection.status_reason: Live thesis monitor refreshed the active weekly pick.

reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is -1.8% and 20-day momentum is 4.2%.
Trend quality is supported by 50% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 2.6% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 2.1%, downside volatility near 1.3%, and a recent max drawdown of 6.2%.
Volume confirmation is -33.4% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is -2.4% versus SPY over 5 days and -2.3% versus the sector ETF.
No recent relevant news passed the filter, so the news layer stayed neutral and contributed less confidence.
Recent MDT company-news coverage was mostly broad market roundups or weakly direct mentions, so the company-news contribution was forced back to neutral.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC 0.00).
Overall model score is -0.049 with low confidence.
